hero.title: Your cultivation has doubts. Terpafy Grow has answers.
hero.subtitle: A cannabis cultivation specialist — available to guide your plant, from beginner to advanced, whenever you need.
hero.whatsappMessage: Hi! I want guidance on my cultivation with Terpafy Grow.
hero.ctaSubtitle: Ask anything about your cultivation, from basic to advanced. The specialist is here.
hero.ecosystemDescription: Terpafy Grow is the gateway to the Terpafy ecosystem. The data generated here connects cultivation to patient care and medical research.

chatWidget.welcomeSub: A cannabis cultivation specialist available to guide your plant

features.label: Terpafy Grow
features.title: A cultivation specialist. Available now.
features.subtitle: Not a search engine. Not a forum. A conversation with a cannabis cultivation specialist who understands your context and guides based on what's happening with your plant right now.
features.highlightBody: Here to help with practical questions about your cultivation — from the first seedling to advanced operations. No matter the level: ask without worry. Each guidance is built from what you are experiencing in your cycle right now.

knowledge.title: Specialized knowledge
knowledge.description: VPD, pH, EC, terpene profile, nutrient management, pests, pruning, flowering — real technical depth on cannabis.

adapts.title: Adapts to your level
adapts.description: Beginner or advanced. The language, depth, and type of guidance change based on who is asking.

available.title: When you need it
available.description: Cultivation problems don't wait. Guidance is available when the grower identifies the problem — not the next day.

diagnosis.title: Contextual diagnosis
diagnosis.description: Asks what it needs before guiding. Doesn't deliver canned answers — delivers diagnoses based on your case.

explains.title: Explains the why
explains.description: Beyond immediate guidance, explains the reasoning. You learn while you solve — and next time you identify it yourself.

ecosystem.title: Part of the ecosystem
ecosystem.description: Terpafy Grow is the entry point. Over time, what happens here connects cultivation to patient care.

bigChat.comingSoon: Coming soon — Terpafy Grow is on its way.
bigChat.subtitle: A cannabis cultivation specialist available to guide your plant
bigChat.defendDesc: Reliable technical guidance at the right moment.
bigChat.differentDesc: Accessible specialist, with clear diagnosis and no guesswork.
bigChat.horizonDesc: The first step of a larger cannabis ecosystem.

messages.text: The middle leaves have yellow spots between the veins.
Spots between veins — good observation. To confirm: what substrate and what pH are you watering with?
Coco at pH 5.9 blocks magnesium absorption — this is the classic Mg deficiency from low pH. Correct to 6.0–6.2 and add 1g/L of magnesium sulfate for 2 weeks. Want the step by step?

diagnosis.label: Diagnosis
diagnosis.title: Asks what it needs to know before guiding.
diagnosis.body: Terpafy Grow doesn't deliver canned answers. It understands the context of your cultivation — stage, substrate, symptoms, conditions — before recommending any action. This makes the difference between guidance that works and guidance that makes things worse.
bullets: Asks the right questions to understand your case, without unnecessary jargon
Identifies the most likely cause before recommending the solution
Guides you on how to confirm the diagnosis through the plant's visual signs
Indicates when the problem is urgent versus when it can be monitored

adaptation.label: Adaptation
adaptation.title: From beginner to advanced, without switching channels.
adaptation.body: Terpafy Grow identifies your level and adapts the depth of guidance. Beginners don't get a technical lecture. Those who already master the basics don't get simplified answers.
bullets: Accessible language for those planting their first seedlings, without intimidating
Real technical depth for those working with VPD, DLI, EC, and terpene profiles
Explains the reasoning, not just the action, for those who want to learn along the way
The same specialist follows the grower's progress over time

manifesto.description: Terpafy Grow starts where the problem starts: in guiding the grower. Each conversation is the first step in a cycle that, over time, connects what is produced to what the patient experiences — transforming fragmentation into predictability.

cta.title: Start with Grow. The ecosystem comes with you.
cta.subtitle: Terpafy Grow is available now. Ask your first question and experience the beginning of the world's first cannabis intelligence ecosystem.
cta.note: Free to start · No credit card · Privacy guaranteed

footer.tagline: The intelligence that connects the cannabis journey, from cultivation to care, for predictable and safe wellbeing.
footer.description: Your cannabis cultivation specialist via WhatsApp.
footer.suite: Terpafy Grow · Care · Med · Assoc · Marketplace
footer.disclaimer: This tool supports cultivation. It does not replace professional medical guidance.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how Terpafy (Developer), responsible for the MVP Health Assistant for Endocannabinoid System (ECS) Patients via WhatsApp, collects, uses, stores and protects users' personal and sensitive data, in compliance with the General Data Protection Law (Law No. 13,709/2018 - LGPD).

section1.title: 1. Controller Identification and Contact
section1.description: Terpafy is a project in the Minimum Viable Product (MVP) phase, currently operated by Terpafy (Developer).
section1.statusText: Terpafy operates as a project in validation phase, not currently having a Legal Entity registration (CNPJ). Legal responsibility for data protection lies with the Controller (Developer).

section2.title: 2. Data Collected and Purpose
section2.description: We collect data to provide health assistance, monitoring and education services.

table.personalExamples: Name, Phone Number (WhatsApp ID), Usage Time
table.personalPurpose: User identification, WhatsApp communication, reminder sending and technical support
table.sensitiveExamples: Symptoms, Medication Dosages, Wellness Diary, Effect Reports
table.sensitivePurpose: Monitoring adherence and effectiveness of medical cannabis treatment, generating progress reports
table.sensitiveLegal: Specific Consent (Art. 11, I) and Life/Health Protection (Art. 11, II, f)
table.usageExamples: Interactions with assistant (sent/received messages), WhatsApp platform technical data
table.usagePurpose: Service quality improvement, Artificial Intelligence (LLM) model training

section3.title: 3. Sensitive Data Processing and Consent
section3.description: The processing of Sensitive Health Data is carried out under strict control and is the central purpose of the MVP.
section3.consentText: When starting to use the Health Assistant, the user must provide specific and highlighted consent for the processing of their health data. Without this consent, the monitoring and symptom diary service cannot be provided.
section3.anonymizationText: Health data may be anonymized and used in statistical studies and service improvement, without being linked to the individual user.

section4.title: 4. Data Sharing
section4.description: Terpafy commits not to sell or rent your personal data. Sharing occurs only in the following cases:
section4.doctorText: Only with express and specific consent from the patient, so the professional can monitor treatment progress.
section4.operatorsText: With technology companies (e.g., cloud providers, WhatsApp API) that process data on behalf of Terpafy, under confidentiality and security contractual clauses.
section4.legalText: To comply with legal, judicial or administrative determinations.

section5.title: 5. Security and Risks (LGPD)
section5.description: Recognizing the sensitive nature of health data and MVP status:
section5.measuresText: We use technical and administrative measures to protect data against unauthorized access, destruction, loss, alteration or disclosure. This includes data encryption in transit and at rest.
section5.riskText: The user acknowledges that, being in MVP phase and without CNPJ, the Controller is an entity in formation. Although the Controller strives to comply with LGPD, the absence of a formal legal structure may, in theory, make accountability difficult in case of incidents.
section5.whatsappText: The user acknowledges that the service is provided through the WhatsApp platform, whose privacy and security policies are the responsibility of Meta Platforms, Inc.

section6.title: 6. Data Subject Rights (LGPD)
section6.description: The data subject has the following rights, which can be exercised at any time through the indicated contact:
section6.right1: Confirmation of the existence of processing
section6.right3: Correction of incomplete, inaccurate or outdated data
section6.right4: Anonymization, blocking or deletion of unnecessary data or data processed in non-compliance

section7.title: 7. Data Retention and Deletion
section7.description: Data is retained only for the time necessary to fulfill the described purposes or to comply with legal obligations. The user may request deletion of their data at any time, except for data that the law requires to be kept.

section8.title: 8. Policy Changes
section8.description: This Privacy Policy may be updated. We recommend that users review it periodically. Continued use of the service after any changes implies acceptance of the new policy.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: For questions or requests related to privacy and data protection:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern the use of the MVP Health Assistant for Endocannabinoid System (ECS) Patients, provided by Terpafy (Developer). By using the Service via WhatsApp, the user agrees to these Terms.

section1.title: 1. The Service and Its Nature
section1.natureText: The Service is a Digital Health Assistant based on Artificial Intelligence (AI) and operated via WhatsApp. It provides dosage reminders, symptom logging, educational content and informative support.
section1.limitationText: The Service IS NOT A SUBSTITUTE FOR MEDICAL CONSULTATION. The Assistant does not perform diagnoses, does not prescribe treatments and should not be used in medical emergency situations. The information provided is informative and adherence support in nature.
section1.mvpText: The Service is in Minimum Viable Product (MVP) phase. This means there may be interruptions, errors or limitations in functionalities. The user accepts to use the Service aware of its experimental and developing nature.

section2.title: 2. Service Use via WhatsApp
section2.platformText: The Service depends on the WhatsApp platform. The user must comply with WhatsApp's Terms of Service and Privacy Policies. Terpafy is not responsible for any problems or interruptions caused by the WhatsApp platform.
section2.communicationText: The user agrees to receive automated and informative messages from Terpafy through the phone number registered on WhatsApp.
section2.responsibilityText: The user is solely responsible for the accuracy and truthfulness of health information entered in the symptom and dosage diary.

section3.title: 3. Intellectual Property
section3.contentText: All educational content, assistant software and visual identity (logo, colors, typography) are property of Terpafy (Developer) and protected by intellectual property laws.
section3.usageText: The user receives a limited, non-exclusive and non-transferable license to use the Service only for personal purposes and to support their health treatment.

section4.title: 4. Limitation of Liability
section4.critical: THIS IS A CRITICAL POINT DUE TO HEALTH NATURE AND MVP STATUS:
section4.noGuaranteeText: Terpafy (Developer) and its creators do not guarantee that use of the Service will result in specific health improvements or that the information provided is 100% error-free. The user assumes full responsibility for their health decisions.
section4.noCNPJText: The user acknowledges that Terpafy operates as an MVP project and does not have CNPJ. In case of legal disputes, liability will be limited to the Controller (Developer) and the terms established in this document.
section4.damagesText: Under no circumstances will Terpafy be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the Service.

section5.title: 5. General Provisions
section5.acceptanceText: Continued use of the Service constitutes full acceptance of these Terms.
section5.changesText: Terpafy reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time. Users will be notified of substantial changes.
section5.lawText: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Federative Republic of Brazil, including LGPD.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: For questions or communication about these Terms:

disclaimer.title: Legal Notice
disclaimer.text: As these are legal documents involving sensitive data and civil liability, it is highly recommended that these texts be reviewed and validated by a lawyer specialized in Digital Law and LGPD before being published and used.

problem.label: The problem
problem.title: The grower has doubts. The internet has opinions. Those are different things.
problem.statLabel: of patients report variation in results between batches of the same product.
problem.body: Forums, WhatsApp groups and Google searches offer information in quantity — but without context, without technical accountability and without knowledge of your specific cultivation. The result is trial, error and a compromised batch.

generic.title: Generic answers that don't solve anything
generic.body: Forums and groups deliver contradictory opinions. The grower applies the wrong guidance and wastes time — and sometimes the entire batch.

late.title: Problems identified too late
late.body: Deficiencies, pH deviations, pests — without guidance at the right moment, the damage is already done when the grower notices.

variation.title: Batch variation without explanation
variation.body: The grower repeats the process and gets different results. Without structured guidance, it's impossible to know what changed.

noFeedback.title: No feedback on what the product produces
noFeedback.body: The grower delivers and hears nothing more. There is no information cycle between what is produced and what the patient experiences.

positioning.title: Not just another group. Guidance with responsibility.
is: Contextual diagnosis, not a generic answer
The entry point to the Terpafy ecosystem
isNot: An informal WhatsApp forum or group

forWho.label: Who it's for
forWho.title: Every profile. A real gain.
forWho.subtitle: Terpafy Grow was built for those at the front line of production — and for those who depend on the quality of that front line to care for people.

beginner.title: Beginner Grower
beginner.subtitle: Just getting started
beginner.body: You don't need to master VPD, EC or pH on day one. Terpafy Grow adapts language and depth to what you already know — and helps you understand what's happening with your plant now, without searching in multiple places at once.

association.title: Association Director
association.subtitle: The manager who needs to guarantee
association.body: What's produced in your operation reaches patients who depend on it. Grow acts as ongoing technical support: validates cultivation decisions, anticipates problems and ensures guidance is aligned with the standard your association needs to maintain.

advanced.title: Advanced Grower
advanced.subtitle: The grower who wants precision
advanced.body: You already know how to grow. What's missing is a verification point that contextualizes what the data shows — unstable pH, light stress, nutrient interactions — and helps you make precise decisions without forum noise. The specialist is here for that.

doctor.title: Prescribing Physician
doctor.subtitle: The clinician who needs a basis
doctor.body: The efficacy of what you prescribe starts with cultivation. Terpafy Grow connects the cultivation specialist to the prescribing physician — ensuring the plant profile behind the guidance matches what the patient needs, based on evidence and traceability.

market.label: ––– Market context
market.title: The market grew in regulation. Not in guidance.
market.paradoxBody1: Medical cannabis has more access and regulation than ever, but growers still decide based on forums and intuition.
market.paradoxBody2: Groups and forums offer information in volume, but without context, without technical responsibility, and without knowledge of each producer's specific cultivation.
market.paradoxBox2Rest: fills the gap: specialized, contextualized guidance that transforms each conversation into the beginning of a data cycle connected to care.
market.paradoxBox3: Isolated cultivation software delivers dashboards, but doesn't guide what to do with the data, and doesn't connect results to patient outcomes.

market.label: Global cannabis market by 2028
market.description: Growth driven by regulation and demand for evidence-based treatments. Traceability and standardization become requirements, not differentiators.

traceability.label: Of operations without structured traceability
traceability.description: Most licensed growers still rely on manual processes. The advancing regulatory standard demands data infrastructure that begins with guidance.

market.closing: Terpafy Grow doesn't compete with forums or crop management software. It defines a new category: the entry point of an ecosystem that connects cultivation to care. The differentiator is the cycle that begins with every conversation.

principles.label: ––– Principles
principles.title: The filters that guide every recommendation.
principles.preamble: These are not decorative values. They are the criteria that determine how the specialist guides, what the platform does, and how each participant in the ecosystem is treated.

science.title: Science as Compass
science.body: Every recommendation is backed by technical validation — not guesswork. We prioritize evidence over intuition, from substrate to dosage.

intelligence.title: Connected Intelligence
intelligence.body: The value is not in isolated guidance. It lies in the connection between what happens in cultivation and what it means for the patient at the end of the chain.

care.title: Care in Every Action
care.body: What is produced here reaches people who depend on it for their wellbeing. Every recommendation is made with empathy and responsibility.

transparency.title: Radical Transparency
transparency.body: We are open about what we know and the limitations of any recommendation. The grower's trust is built through honesty.

ecosystem.title: Strengthen the Ecosystem
ecosystem.body: The grower who learns and grows strengthens the entire ecosystem. We build to give autonomy — not to create dependency.

simplify.title: Simplify the Complex
simplify.body: Our responsibility is to make the complexity of cannabis accessible so any grower can make better decisions.
